items.description: Disabled vehicle on I-95 southbound between Exit: I-676/US 30 - CENTRAL PHILA/CALLOWHILL ST and 1 miles NORTH of Exit 20: COLUMBUS BLVD/WASHINGTON AVE. There is a lane restriction.
